steps.title: Use the species difference
steps.content: The researchers found a clear difference between the two birds: great blue herons prefer deep water during breeding season, but small dark herons do not. A strategy that increases breeding-season water depth should therefore favor great blue herons more than small dark herons.

steps.title: Choose the supported comparison
steps.content: Choice B discusses lifespan, which the passage never mentions. Choice C introduces birds that do not typically live in wetlands, and Choice D says appeal decreases for both species, even though deeper water should appeal to great blue herons. Choice A compares attracting small dark herons with attracting great blue herons and follows from the species difference. The answer is A.
